description: Manage infrastructure, services, deployments, access, and settings on a self-hosted Dokploy instance.

auth.label: API Key
auth.description: An API key created from the Dokploy dashboard under Settings > API Keys. The key is sent in the x-api-key header.

extraFields.label: Instance URL
extraFields.description: The public HTTP or HTTPS URL of your Dokploy instance, without an API endpoint path. See https://docs.dokploy.com/docs/core/api.

actions.name: ai-delete
actions.description: Modify Dokploy state via POST /ai.delete. Warning: this operation can remove, stop, or otherwise disrupt resources.
